summary: Stream 3 (S3-01 à S3-04) E2E testing completed. All 16 backend tests passed. All UI flows validated for admin, PMO and viewer roles. 4 fixes (realistic names, allocations, dashboard widget, teams cleanup) also verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Timesheets.jsx line 571: canValidate = user?.role !== 'READ_ONLY' — this means PMO and ADMIN can validate, which is intentional. However the backend /timesheets/pending-count also responds to READ_ONLY (200). This is benign since the Layout.jsx already gates the UI badge for non-READ_ONLY, but backend could add a guard if desired.
service.py daily_cap uses (capacity_jh_month/21) * availability_rate — correct per spec, yields ~0.95 JH for 20JH/100% resource.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created — used existing timesheets data (35 submitted entries in seed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stream 3 (Timesheets S3-01 to S3-04) fully tested and working. Backend token key is access_token (not token). All 4 corrections validated: realistic resource names (Sophie Martin, Thomas Dubois, etc.), no parasite teams (Dev A/B/Infra/QA/Support only), Dashboard capacity alerts widget above charts, Thomas Dubois allocations visible. Timesheets sidebar badge shows 24 (pending count). Viewer (READ_ONLY) correctly has no Validation tab.

feature_status.S3-01_cell_autosave: PASS - Cell input with 500ms debounce, PUT /api/timesheets/entry returns 200

feature_status.S3-02_badge_sidebar: PASS - Badge shows 24 pending submissions (screenshot confirmed)
feature_status.S3-02_validation_tab: PASS - 4 validation groups shown with Valider/Rejeter buttons
feature_status.S3-02_reject_modal: PASS - Modal opens, requires reason, Confirmer le rejet button works
feature_status.S3-03_consumed_md: PASS - consumed_md > 0 found on at least one work-allocation
feature_status.S3-04_reports_resource: PASS - Pivot table by resource displayed
feature_status.S3-04_reports_project: PASS - Pivot table by project displayed
feature_status.S3-04_export_csv: PASS - Export CSV button visible and backend returns CSV
feature_status.dashboard_capacity_alerts: PASS - Widget above charts (y=468 vs charts y=659)
feature_status.realistic_resource_names: PASS - Sophie Martin, Thomas Dubois, Alexandre Moreau etc.
feature_status.no_parasite_teams: PASS - Only Dev A, Dev B, Infra, QA, Support
feature_status.viewer_no_validation: PASS - Validation tab absent for READ_ONLY
